_comment: AsymmFlow company overlay — copy and edit this file to customise division profiles without recompiling. Place overlay.json next to the binary, in the data/ directory, or in the platform app-data directory. See pkg/overlay/overlay.go for field documentation.
_jurisdiction_comment: ISO-3166 alpha-2 tax jurisdiction routing invoices to a pkg/compliance engine (BH, SA, IN). Optional: derived from country name when blank.
_exchange_rates_comment: FX rates → base currency (BHD). One unit of each currency in BHD. Base currency is always 1.0. Single source of truth for both import-time and live conversion.

bank_details: 1. Demo Bank B, A/c No: 00DEMO0000000002, IBAN: BH29BECN00000000000000, SWIFT: BECNBHBMXXX

_business_rules_comment: Costing/approval policy numbers. Margins/discounts are fractions (0.15 = 15%). These reproduce the built-in defaults; edit to ship a different vertical's policy without recompiling.
_supplier_aliases_comment: Commercial supplier vocabulary for the pkg/crm/supplierlink resolution engine. canonical_codes maps variant supplier-code spellings to the canonical code on the supplier row; brand_aliases maps a brand token to the supplier search terms it implies. Omit the field to keep the built-in default; an explicit empty object clears it.
_license_key_prefix_comment: Leading token of license keys ({PREFIX}-{ROLE}-{6-char}). Blank or omitted falls back to the built-in 'PH' so existing activations keep validating.
